evals.prompt: Update the o4aa knowledge hub from latest field intel
evals.expected_output: Pulls from all 4 Slack channels and Confluence, identifies new intelligence, updates relevant content files additively, outputs a structured summary of what changed vs what was skipped
Only updates the 5 product section files (o4aa-products, mcp-adapter, mcp-bridge, auth0-for-agents, fga-rag-deep-dive), pulls sources, and reports on those files only

evals.prompt: The knowledge hub is stale — sync it from what's been happening in the o4aa Slack channels this week
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a knowledge hub update request, pulls Slack channels, extracts field intelligence, updates affected content files, produces summary
